menu.title: Pet Adopter
pet.label: {{petType}} {{number}}
status.no-bowls: No empty pet bowls! ({{totalPets}} pet(s) on farm)
status.no-bowls-short: No pet bowls available! Build one first.
log.loaded: Pet Adopter loaded! Press your hotkey to open the adoption menu.
log.stardewui-missing: StardewUI Framework not found! Cannot create adoption menu.
log.menu-no-stardewui: Cannot open adoption menu — StardewUI not loaded.
gmcm.description: Adopt any pet breed for free with a simple UI. Configure your hotkey below.
gmcm.open-menu-key.name: Open Menu Key
gmcm.open-menu-key.tooltip: The key combination to open the pet adoption menu.
gmcm.require-free-bowl.name: Require Free Bowl
gmcm.require-free-bowl.tooltip: When enabled, you can only adopt a pet if there is an empty pet bowl on the farm. Disabled by default (vanilla has no limit, just a friendship penalty).
